_comment: Declarative desired-state for the Mitos Discord server. The provision.mjs script reconciles a server to this state idempotently (looks up by name, creates only what is missing). Permission names map to Discord permission flags in provision.mjs.

channels.name: welcome
channels.topic: What Mitos is and where to go. Isolated, forkable computers for your AI agents.

channels.name: rules
channels.topic: Be excellent to each other. Full code of conduct linked from the repo.

channels.name: announcements
channels.topic: Releases, blog posts, and launches. Mirrors GitHub releases.

channels.name: roles
channels.topic: Self-assign interest roles. Also offered during onboarding.

channels.name: general
channels.topic: Open chat about Mitos, AI agents, and sandboxing.

channels.name: showcase
channels.topic: Show what you built with Mitos: agents, forks, demos.

channels.name: support
channels.topic: Hosted and SDK usage questions. One post per problem. Search before posting.

channels.name: self-hosting
channels.topic: Running Mitos on your own KVM/Kubernetes cluster.

channels.name: feedback-ideas
channels.topic: Quick feature wishes. Larger asks belong in GitHub issues or Discussions.

channels.name: dev
channels.topic: Contributor coordination, architecture, PR and issue chatter.

channels.name: good-first-issues
channels.topic: Good first issues, fed from the GitHub good first issue label.

channels.name: ci-and-releases
channels.topic: Build, release, and CI signal for maintainers.

channels.name: mod-log
channels.topic: AutoMod alerts and Discord community updates.

welcomeScreen.description: Isolated, forkable computers for your AI agents.

options.label: I self-host Mitos
options.description: Running on your own KVM/Kubernetes cluster

seedMessages.welcome:
# Welcome to Mitos

**Isolated, forkable computers for your AI agents.** Millisecond microVM sandbox forking on Kubernetes: fork a running VM into parallel attempts and restore from memory in tens of milliseconds.

- Website: <https://mitos.run>
- Core repo: <https://github.com/mitos-run/mitos>
- Quickstart: <https://github.com/mitos-run/mitos/blob/main/docs/quickstart.md>

**Where to go**
- Usage questions: head to the support forum
- Running it yourself: the self-hosting forum
- Want to build Mitos: react in roles, then jump into dev

Glad you are here.
seedMessages.rules:
# Rules

1. Be respectful. No harassment, hate, or personal attacks.
2. Keep it on topic per channel. Use the support forums for help, one post per problem.
3. No spam, scams, self-promotion, or unsolicited DMs.
4. Do not share exploits or others' private data. Report security issues per the repo SECURITY.md.
5. English in shared channels so everyone can follow.

The full code of conduct lives in the repo: <https://github.com/mitos-run/mitos/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md>

By participating you agree to follow these rules.
